name: Peak insulin + in-target fast drop
description: Mirrors 2026-04-09 20:50 observation. BG is in-target (7.3) but dropping fast and accelerating (-0.125 mmol/min) at ~110 min post-evening-injection — soluble near peak plateau. The 30-min projection crosses hypoFloor (5.0), so the engine must (1) keep trend.urgent=true despite BG being >7.0, (2) size the correction against the projected 3.55 (not the current 7.3), and (3) route to emergency fast sugar, NOT slow carbs.
